message:
fix: respect stealth mode (no-git-ops) in backup git push (GH#2290)

isBackupGitPushEnabled() did not check the no-git-ops config, so
bd ready in stealth mode would create backup commits and push them
to the git remote. Add an early return when no-git-ops is true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
